M-REGISTRY.NAME: Proxy Registry
M-REGISTRY.Purpose: Persist verified users and their assigned proxy metadata in DETS.

Scope.Item: Store email, generated SNI domain, and issuance metadata
Support lookup by email and possibly by token-derived identity

Interfaces.Interface: Returns an existing issued proxy if present.
Commits verified user and proxy assignment to DETS.

Risks.Risk: DETS corruption or bad path handling can lose user state
Concurrent writes require disciplined access patterns
